scheme.scheme_name: HDFC Gold ETF Fund of Fund Direct Plan Growth

facts.exit_load: Exit load of 1%, if redeemed within 15 days.
facts.taxation: If you redeem within two years, returns are taxed as per your Income Tax slab. If you redeem after two years, returns are taxed at 12.5%.

sections.title: Overview
sections.text: HDFC Gold ETF Fund is a Gold Commodities mutual fund offered by HDFC Mutual Fund. Its riskometer classification is Moderately High. Its benchmark index is Domestic Price of Gold. The fund manager is Krishan Daga. It was launched on 01-Jan-2013. Its ISIN is INF179K01VX0.

sections.title: Fees and Charges
sections.text: The expense ratio of HDFC Gold ETF Fund is 0.2%. The exit load is: Exit load of 1%, if redeemed within 15 days. Stamp duty is 0.005% (from July 1st, 2020).

sections.title: Investment Limits
sections.text: The minimum SIP investment is ₹100. The minimum lumpsum (one-time) investment is ₹100. The minimum additional investment is ₹100. The minimum withdrawal amount is ₹100. Lock-in: No lock-in period. SIP investment is allowed.

sections.title: Taxation
sections.text: Taxation for HDFC Gold ETF Fund (category: Commodities): If you redeem within two years, returns are taxed as per your Income Tax slab. If you redeem after two years, returns are taxed at 12.5%.

sections.title: Fund Size and NAV
sections.text: The assets under management (AUM) is approximately ₹12,121.18 crore. The latest NAV is ₹43.7198 as of 30-Jun-2026.

sections.title: Fund House and Registrar
sections.text: The registrar and transfer agent (RTA) for HDFC Gold ETF Fund is CAMS. The AMC (HDFC Mutual Fund) registered address is "HDFC House", 2nd Floor, H. T. Parekh Marg, 165-166, BackbayReclamation, Churchgate Mumbai 400020.

sections.title: Scheme Description
sections.text: The Scheme seeks to generate capital appreciation by investing in units of HDFC Gold Exchange Traded Fund.
